title: Dimensional Tears
description: A revamp of Nether Portal mechanics and End terrain generation
body:
# What's Dimensional Tears?
Dimensional tears lubricates the spaces between dimensions with a new, mysterious fluid! Nether portals will be your first exposure. Found in ruined nether portal chests, *Bottles of Dimensional Tears* can be drunk to destabilize your body, granting the *Rifting* effect. After a few seconds, Rifting teleports you back to spawn. Watch out though--damage and water cancel the effect. 

The bottle of tears has another important purpose: **it replaces flint and steel as the method of opening portals.** If you run out of tears from chests, more can always be obtained by using an empty bottle on a charged respawn anchor.

The final form of the tears is found in the End. Where there once was void, there is now a roiling ocean of teleportative fluid. When dropped into it, you no longer die, and are instead sent to world spawn. Pools of tears on end islands can be bucketed and used for your own purposes.
